overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk urban environment from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning at a rain-slicked intersection with a burning vehicle and neon-lit YAIBA tower, proceeding along a covered commercial sidewalk past vending machines and NPCs, and ending at a street corner with vibrant neon signage. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with wet reflective surfaces, holographic advertisements, and mixed natural-artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with burning vehicle and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the intersection toward the YAIBA building, observing the burning vehicle and surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and tank top walking past the camera on the left side
burning vehicle stationary in the crosswalk with visible flames and smoke

entered.detail: tall modern glass skyscraper with large cyan YAIBA signage near the base
black vehicle engulfed in flames sitting on the yellow crosswalk markings
large digital screens displaying advertisements featuring a woman with a weapon
tall utility pole with multiple light fixtures and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-slicked urban intersection in a cyberpunk city, with a burning vehicle prominently positioned on the crosswalk. The camera approaches the YAIBA glass tower while a pedestrian with red hair passes by on the left. Digital billboards and neon signs illuminate the scene with cyan and pink light reflecting off the wet pavement.

events.description: turns right from open intersection into covered sidewalk area beneath building overhang

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner of the YAIBA building to enter the covered pedestrian walkway

entered.detail: metal and concrete overhead structure providing cover over the pedestrian walkway
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street traffic

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the YAIBA building corner, transitioning from the open intersection into a covered pedestrian walkway. The burning vehicle and digital billboards exit the frame as the covered roof structure enters overhead. The street railing appears on the left, separating the walkway from the road.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past various pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic vending machines with glowing green and orange displays
bright neon-lit shop fronts with holographic advertisements and signage

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered commercial sidewalk, the scene features glowing vending machines and digital storefronts on the right. The overhead structure blocks most of the sky, creating an artificial lighting environment with neon reflections. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and sparse traffic is visible beyond the railing on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered dining area with vending machines and outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor seating areas and vending machines, observing NPCs sitting at tables

notable_agents.action: NPC with mohawk sitting at a plastic table eating food

entered.detail: red and blue vending machines labeled Insta-Food with BIG text and food imagery
white and red plastic chairs and small tables arranged outside the shops
traditional Japanese style red paper lanterns hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The walkway narrows into a more enclosed dining area featuring Insta-Food vending machines and plastic outdoor seating. Red Japanese lanterns hang overhead, adding warm accent lighting. An NPC sits at a table on the right eating, while the camera continues forward past the seating area toward the end of the block.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with neon signage and traffic barriers

events.description: emerges from covered walkway to open street corner with view of intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the street corner and observing the intersection with passing vehicles and neon signs

entered.detail: large yellow neon sign reading Hometeam on the building facade
red and white striped construction barriers blocking part of the street
palm tree in a square planter on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens to a street corner with a view of the next intersection. The Hometeam neon sign glows yellow on the left building, while traffic barriers and a palm tree occupy the corner. Vehicles pass by on the wet street as the camera surveys the open urban environment, with the red lanterns now visible to the right near the building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a chaotic, rain-slicked urban intersection into a sheltered commercial corridor before emerging back into the open city. It begins by approaching the YAIBA glass tower past a burning vehicle, where cyan and pink neon lights reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera turns right, the open intersection gives way to a covered pedestrian walkway, shifting the environment from an expansive street to a confined space defined by an overhead roof and glowing vending machines. The scene then narrows further into an enclosed dining area accented by red Japanese lanterns and plastic seating before the camera continues forward toward the end of the block. Finally, the walkway opens up to a new street corner, revealing a yellow Hometeam neon sign and a palm tree as the camera surveys the surrounding wet urban landscape.
